CPSG - College Park Scholars- Science and Global Change

CPSG100 College Park Scholars: Science & Global Change First-Year Colloquium I (1 Credit) Introductory colloquium: Examination of issues related to science and global change. Restriction: Students must be enrolled in the College Park Scholars Science & Global Change (CPSG) program.

CPSG250 College Park Scholars: Science & Global Change - Research Practicum (1-3 Credits) Supervised research experience in an interest area related to science and global change. Prerequisite: CPSG200. Restriction: Students must be enrolled in the College Park Scholars Science & Global Change (CPSG) program.
